payload.answer: The same Slack event appears to have been delivered twice. I can help avoid creating a duplicate memory for “Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.”
repair_options: Treat the repeated Slack event ID as a duplicate and do not create a second memory.
Ask the user to confirm whether this should be recorded once despite the duplicate delivery.
If there is already an existing matching memory, keep the existing memory unchanged.
If no matching memory exists, offer to save the fact once only after confirmation.
